label: Automated decision safeguards
description: Limits, procedural protections, explanations, contestability, or human involvement for consequential automated decisions.

label: AI risk management
description: Lifecycle identification, assessment, prioritization, treatment, and monitoring of AI risks.

label: Impact assessment
description: A documented assessment conducted before or during a higher-risk data or AI activity.

label: Security controls
description: Technical and organizational measures used to protect data, systems, models, and services.

label: Incident response
description: Detection, remediation, documentation, and notification of security or personal-data incidents.

label: Transparency and explainability
description: Information that makes an AI or data practice visible, understandable, and open to scrutiny.

label: Human oversight
description: Meaningful human involvement, review, intervention, or accountability in automated systems.

label: Training-data governance
description: Requirements or practices governing the provenance, quality, legality, representativeness, and stewardship of AI training data.

label: Frontier-model safety
description: Evaluation, reporting, safeguards, and incident practices associated with highly capable or advanced AI models.

label: Cross-border data transfer
description: Conditions and mechanisms governing disclosure or transfer of personal data across borders.

label: Accountability and governance
description: Assigned responsibility, policies, documentation, reporting, and organizational structures for trustworthy data and AI practices.

label: Global AI coordination
description: International cooperation, shared science, policy dialogue, standards coordination, and capacity building for AI governance.
